title: User Address Management UI and Order Tracking
description: Implement UI for managing delivery addresses and tracking orders
requirements: Profile page: /profile/addresses — list all addresses, add/edit/delete, set default
AddressCard component: display address with label, recipient, phone, address, default badge, edit/delete buttons
AddressForm component: form for creating/editing address (name, recipient, phone, address type, full address, provider, pickup point)
Checkout page: dropdown to select saved address or 'Add new address'
Pre-fill checkout form with default address data
Order detail page: display tracking URL as button 'Отследить на Почте РФ/СДЭК/Ozon/WB'
Order status badge: color-coded (pending=gray, shipped=blue, delivered=green, failed=red)
Real-time status updates: poll /orders/{id} every 30s on order detail page
Mobile-optimized: bottom sheet for address selection on mobile
acceptance_criteria: User can CRUD addresses in profile
Tracking button opens provider tracking page in new tab
Mobile UX: smooth bottom sheet for address selection
